pr_title: refactor: unify request context builder across services
pr_description: Extracts `RequestContext` into a shared module so all three services (auth, billing, notifications) build their request contexts the same way. Also adds support for attaching metadata tags to a context for distributed tracing.
diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/shared/context.py
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+"""Shared request context for distributed tracing."""
+
+import uuid
+from datetime import datetime
+
+
+class RequestContext:
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        service: str,
+        user_id: int | None = None,
+        tags: dict = {},       # BUG: mutable default argument — shared across all instances
+        trace_ids: list = [],  # BUG: same issue with list
+    ):
+        self.service = service
+        self.user_id = user_id
+        self.request_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
+        self.created_at = datetime.utcnow()
+        self.tags = tags        # BUG: stores reference, mutations bleed between callers
+        self.trace_ids = trace_ids
+
+    def add_tag(self, key: str, value: str) -> None:
+        self.tags[key] = value  # BUG: mutates the shared default dict
+
+    def push_trace(self, trace_id: str) -> None:
+        self.trace_ids.append(trace_id)  # BUG: mutates the shared default list
+
+    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
+        return {
+            "service": self.service,
+            "user_id": self.user_id,
+            "request_id": self.request_id,
+            "created_at": self.created_at.isoformat(),
+            "tags": self.tags,
+            "trace_ids": self.trace_ids,
+        }
+
+
+def build_context(
+    service: str,
+    user_id: int | None = None,
+    extra_tags: dict = {},     # BUG: mutable default argument again in factory function
+) -> RequestContext:
+    ctx = RequestContext(service=service, user_id=user_id)
+    ctx.tags.update(extra_tags)
+    return ctx
